projects.title: EBAOH - Reviews Platform
projects.description: A gamified product review platform where users earn points and badges for reviewing products. Features include user authentication, product catalog, review system, and gamification elements.

projects.title: Video Learning Platform
projects.description: A subscription-based video learning platform with content management, user progress tracking, and payment integration.

projects.title: Digital PBX Management
projects.description: An internal system for managing digital PBX configurations and call routing, featuring real-time monitoring and reporting.

projects.title: GStraccini BOT - GitHub bot
projects.description: GStraccini-bot automates repository management, ensuring organization and health by handling pull requests, issues, comments, and commits.

projects.title: Clean CV maker
projects.description: Helps IT professionals to create a clean CV in HTML, PDF and JSON

projects.title: VTEX & Sankhya ERP Integration Suite (Freelance)
projects.description: Freelance integration suite connecting the VTEX e-commerce platform and Sankhya ERP with clients' back-office systems, plus payment gateway integrations delivered as independent contract work.

projects.title: Open Banking & BaaS Platform (Banco BS2)
projects.description: Banking-as-a-Service product exposing account, payment, and open banking APIs to partner businesses, backed by distributed processing and containerized deployments.

projects.title: E-commerce Refund Automation (C&A Modas)
projects.description: Automated the payment refund/reversal pipeline for a nationwide fashion retailer's e-commerce operation, integrating Adyen, Zendesk, SAP, and Oracle to speed up customer refunds.

projects.title: PIX/SPI Instant Payments Platform (Banco BS2)
projects.description: Architected the CORE and Indirect PIX solutions for a Brazilian digital bank, implementing BACEN's instant payments (PIX/SPI) and ISO 20022 messaging for real-time settlement and accounting.

projects.title: Digital Wallet & Remittance Platform (Grace Kennedy)
projects.description: Digital wallet and cross-border remittance system for the Caribbean's largest financial group, integrating Western Union transfers with cloud messaging and RPA-driven back-office processes.

projects.title: Open Banking IdP & DCR Platform (FCamara)
projects.description: Identity Provider (IdP) and Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) services for an Open Banking/Open Finance initiative, plus a white-label platform integrating with Banco Pan.

projects.title: Fashion Search & Discovery Platform (Farfetch)
projects.description: Improved search relevance and discovery for a global luxury fashion marketplace as part of the Search & Scouts team, working alongside data scientists to enrich search schemas and ranking.

projects.title: Grocery Fulfillment Platform (Talabat)
projects.description: Microservices platform improving grocery fulfillment across a food-delivery marketplace, including real-time catalog availability heartbeat, item replacement flows, and automated robocalls for order handling.

projects.title: Billing & Shadow Ledger Platform (OUTsurance)
projects.description: Insurance billing and collections system handling payment schedules and a shadow ledger, exchanging ISO 20022 PAIN messages and integrating with the policy administration portal and payment gateways.
